storyboard.content: My heart sometimes pounds very hard or feels like it skips a beat
When it happens I feel slightly lightheaded
No chest pain or shortness of breath during the episodes
This has been happening a few times a week for about a month
Each episode lasts only a few seconds and does not stop me from my daily activities
I am a 40-year-old woman with no history of heart problems and I drink about 4 cups of coffee a day
The episodes seem to come on their own without a clear trigger I can pinpoint
